checks.describe: labs/m3b/ reference assets exist (README + Track B config)
lab.md documents the mlx-lm flag-name version variance (machine-independent, GPU-agnostic)
checks.run: grep -o 'Flag name varies by mlx-lm version' site/docs/m3b-finetuning/lab.md

assert.contains: Flag name varies by mlx-lm version

checks.describe: if ~/mlx-lora-env exists, mlx_lm imports inside it; else SKIP-OK (no GPU/venv assumed on this runner)
checks.run: [ -d ~/mlx-lora-env ] && (source ~/mlx-lora-env/bin/activate && python -c "import mlx_lm; print('mlx_lm OK')") || echo SKIP-OK
